channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 2025 Phillies Home Opener: What you need to know
item.description: Attention Phillies fans, the day is finally here! The Phils are getting ready to face off against the Colorado Rockies at Citizens Bank Park at 3:05 p.m. for their home opener. What can fans expect? Citizens Bank Park is SOLD OUT for Opening Day.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, PHL 17

item.title: San Diego Padres sweep Atlanta Braves in 2025 opening series
item.description: The San Diego Padres secured a four-game sweep of the Atlanta Braves with a 5-0 win Sunday, marking their second time in franchise history to start a season 4-0, with Nick Pivetta making a dominant debut.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Jakub Mensik prevents Djokovic from his 100th title, wins Miami Open for first ATP trophy
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Novak Djokovic faced a series of obstacles Sunday in the Miami Open final: a delay of more than 5 1/2 hours before the match, an eye infection and a slippery court due to high levels of humidity following the rain.
item.dc:creator: MARC BERMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Suns star Kevin Durant helped off court after injuring left leg
item.description: Phoenix Suns All-Star Kevin Durant was helped to the locker room with 6:57 left in the third quarter against Houston on Sunday night after falling to the floor in a collision with the Rockets’ Jabari Smith Jr. Smith was called for a foul under the Phoenix basket as Durant fell to the floor.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Final Four to feature rare matchups of only No 1 seeds as Auburn outlasts Michigan State to secure final spot
item.description: Auburn knocked off Michigan State on Sunday evening to complete a Final Four of exclusively top seeds. Duke will meet Houston, while Florida will face Auburn in San Antonio.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Royals' Jonathan India hit by 99 mph fastball, leaves game
item.description: "He threw a pitch that he doesn't ever throw, the pitch before, which was a four-seam fastball. It was his first one of the year," Pasquantino said.
item.dc:creator: Jared Bush, NewsNation

item.title: Denny Hamlin ends 10-year win drought at Martinsville Speedway
item.description: MARTINSVILLE, Va. (AP) — At the track he loves to dominate, Denny Hamlin was back on top with a new face atop his pit box.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lauren Betts and UCLA reach first Final Four of women's NCAA Tournament, beating LSU 72-65
item.description: SPOKANE, Wash. (AP) — Lauren Betts had 17 points and seven rebounds despite spending the entire second quarter on the bench, and top overall seed UCLA reached its first Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament with a 72-65 victory over LSU on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn completes sweep of No. 1 seeds into Final Four, beating Michigan State 70-64
item.description: Johni Broome had 25 points and 14 rebounds, and Auburn took command with 17 unanswered points in the first half to beat Michigan State 70-64 and complete a sweep of No. 1 seeds advancing to the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Defending champion South Carolina returns to Final Four of women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: Chloe Kitts scored 14 points and defending national champion South Carolina reached the Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament for a fifth straight year, beating Duke 54-50 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke's great D sends Blue Devils to their 18th Final Four with an 85-65 win over Alabama
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Duke freshman Cooper Flagg swooped across the paint and swatted an Alabama player’s shot completely off the court. The ball landed in the stands. Flagg and the Blue Devils -- they’re headed to the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ilia Malinin cruises to 2nd straight title to cap an American gold rush at figure skating worlds
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ilia Malinin walked toward the ice for his free skate at the world championships with the swagger of a conquering hero. Then he backed up the bravado.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA great Shaquille O'Neal's son Shaqir leaving Florida A&M and transferring again: report
item.description: Shaqir O'Neal will enter the transfer portal, On3 reported. The junior forward started 17 games for Florida A&M last season after two years at Texas Southern.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hailey Van Lith scores 26 points to lead TCU to 1st Elite Eight with 71-62 win over Notre Dame
item.description: TCU is in unchartered territory thanks to Hailey Van Lith, reaching the Elite Eight for the first time.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Golden Knights overcome Donato's hat trick to beat Blackhawks 5-3 for 5th straight win
item.description: Pavel Dorofeyev scored a power-play goal with 3:10 left to snap a tie, and the Vegas Golden Knights rallied for their fifth straight win, 5-3 over the Chicago Blackhawks on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC loses to defending champs in OT, 2-1
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) - Sam Bennett scored his second goal of the game off an assist from Brad Marchand at 4:18 of overtime to give the Florida Panthers a 2-1 win over the Utah Hockey Club at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday. By earning one point, Utah is now nine points behind St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL seeks redemption in Minnesota after home setback
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4) — Real Salt Lake looks to bounce back from a rare home loss as they go on the road to face Minnesota United FC on Saturday night. Real Salt Lake’s attack will be bolstered by the return of Polish attacking winger Dominic Marzcuk and U.S.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Former Green Bay Packer charged for alleged dogfighting
item.description: The standout college football running back played 14 games for the Green and Gold between 1994 and 1995.
item.dc:creator: Nick Witwer, NewsNation

item.title: New San Diego Padres mural in North Park nears completion
item.description: A new San Diego Padres-themed mural in North Park replacing a previous work of public art that had been defaced earlier this year by fans of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers is nearing completion, just in time for opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Loyola Chicago men's basketball team beats Kent State, advances to NIT semifinals
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Loyola Chicago men's basketball team didn't make the 68-team NCAA Tournament field this season, but the Ramblers are still ramblin' on to a different Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox Opening Day: A lot of 'new' on the South Side in 2025. What to know if you're headed to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — After a 2024 season that everyone would rather forget, there's a lot of "new" on the South Side as the White Sox get set to embark on their 2025 campaign Thursday. There's a new manager, Will Venable. There's a new stadium name, Rate Field. There's a new food and beverage menu.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox DFA Oscar Colás, claim switch-hitting outfielder off waivers from Rockies
item.description: The Chicago White Sox designated top prospect Oscar Colás for assignment and claimed switch-hitting outfielder Greg Jones off waivers from the Colorado Rockies, while reassigned five players to minor league camp and optioned right-handed pitcher Justin Anderson to Triple-A.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Russell Wilson is heading to the New York Giants, AP source says
item.description: Russell Wilson has agreed on a one-year contract with the New York Giants, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bryan Hodgson named University of South Florida head men's basketball coach
item.description: Bryan Hodgson, one of the nation’s top recruiters and a rising head coach, has been named the University of South Florida head men’s basketball coach, Vice President for Athletics Michael Kelly announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: USC star JuJu Watkins suffers season-ending knee injury in March Madness win over Mississippi State
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins was carried off the floor with a season-ending knee injury in the first quarter of top-seeded Southern California’s game against Mississippi State in the NCAA Tournament on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5
